VariantType.description: Define available variant attributes and validation rules

Record_string.any_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

CartDetailV2.description: Cart detail response with variant information and seller grouping

default_version.description: Global default version for users without overrides

rollout_percentage.description: Percentage of users (0-100) to receive V2 via rollout

enabled.description: Master kill-switch: when false, everyone gets V1

info.title: SC Market API v2
info.description: Star Citizen Market API v2 - TSOA-based with auto-generated routes and OpenAPI specification

200.description: List of variant types with validation rules

get.description:
Get all variant types

Returns a list of all available variant types with their validation rules.
Variant types define the attributes that can be used when creating item variants,
including quality_tier, quality_value, crafted_source, and blueprint_tier.

Results are ordered by display_order for consistent UI presentation.

Get variant type by ID

Returns detailed information about a specific variant type including
validation rules (min_value, max_value, allowed_values) and display configuration.

Get stock lots with filters

Retrieves stock lots with optional filters for listing, game item, location,
and quality tier range. Includes variant attributes and listing information.
Results are paginated.

put.description:
Update stock lot

Updates stock lot quantity, listed status, location, or notes.
Validates ownership before allowing updates. Prevents negative quantities.
Triggers quantity_available recalculation via database trigger.

requestBody.description: Update request with fields to modify

schema.description: Update request with fields to modify

200.description: Summary with successful/failed counts and errors

post.description:
Bulk update stock lots

Performs bulk operations on multiple stock lots in a single transaction.
Supports update_quantity, list/unlist, and transfer_location operations.
Validates ownership for all lots before proceeding.

requestBody.description: Bulk update request with lot IDs and operation

schema.description: Bulk update request with lot IDs and operation

get.description: Get order detail with variant information

Search listings with filters

Searches active listings using full-text search, quality tier filters, price filters,
and game item filters. Results are paginated and include price/quality ranges.

post.description:
Create a new listing with variants

Creates a listing with stock lots and variant pricing in a single atomic transaction.
Supports both unified pricing (one price for all variants) and per-variant pricing.

requestBody.description: Listing creation request with title, description, game item, pricing mode, and lots

schema.description: Listing creation request with title, description, game item, pricing mode, and lots

get.description:
Get listing detail with variant breakdown

Returns comprehensive listing information including seller details, game item info,
and a breakdown of all variants with their attributes, quantities, and prices.

200.description: Updated listing detail with variant breakdown

put.description:
Update listing

Updates listing title, description, base_price, or per-variant prices.
Validates ownership and prevents editing sold or cancelled listings.
All modifications are logged to the audit trail.

requestBody.description: Update request with fields to modify

schema.description: Update request with fields to modify

get.description:
Get current user's listings with variant breakdown

Returns listings owned by the authenticated user with aggregated variant information
including variant count, total quantity, price range, and quality tier range.
Supports filtering by status and pagination with sorting.

parameters.description: Optional status filter (active, sold, expired, cancelled)
parameters.name: status

get.description:
Get current feature flag setting

Returns the current market version (V1 or V2) for the authenticated user.
Also indicates whether the client should show debug / feature-flag tooling
(admin users, or any user when NODE_ENV is development).

Restricted to authenticated users only.

post.description:
Set feature flag

Sets the market version (V1 or V2) for the authenticated user.
This allows developers to switch between V1 and V2 experiences.

Restricted to users with developer privileges (admin role) only.

get.description: Get current user's cart with variant details

post.description: Add item to cart with variant selection

put.description: Update buyer notes for a seller's cart items

delete.description: Clear cart for a specific seller

post.description: Checkout cart for a specific seller and create order

get.description: Get feature flag stats (override counts, config summary)

delete.description: Remove a per-user version override (user falls back to global config)
